titleStmt.title: SII 22.102: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 102. (A.R. No. 102 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE. TRIBH. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA (III)—14th YEAR (A.D. 1191-2).

summary.p: This records the endowment of a wet land as dēvadāna to the temple of Tirukkapālīśvaram-Uḍaiyār at Śaṇbai alias Vīrarājēndrapuram on the northern bank of the Peṇṇai in Vāṇagōppāḍi a division of Rājarājavaḷanāḍu by Śēdiyarāyaṉ Ākāraśūraṉ alias Rājagambhīrach-Chēdiyarāyaṉ the Malayamāṉ chief of Kiḷiyūr. Rājagambhīra was a title of Rājarāja II (M.E.R. 1927, Part II, para 25).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulo
ttuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4vatu rā
jarājavaḷanāṭṭu vāṇakoppāṭip peṇṇai
vaṭakaraic caṇpaiyāna virarājentrapurattu Uṭaiyā
r tirukkavāliśvaramuṭaiyāṟku kiḷiyūr malaiyamā
ncetiyarāyanāyiṉa Ākāracūranāṉa Irā
cagampiracetiyarāyaṉen Innāyanā
ṟku tevatānamāka viṭṭa nañcainilam
Erivāykkālukku teṟkum meṟku ceṅka
ḻaṉikkuṭṭatte cellavum tenmeṟku paṭar
pāṟaikku kiḻakkum teṟku kulaivāyum kiḻak
ku tiruccūlakkallukku meṟkum I
ku tevatānamāka viṭṭeṉ cetiya
ṉa Ākāracūraṉāṉa Irācagampira
cetiyarāyaṉneṉ Itu mā
ṟuvāṉ Eḻānarakam pukuvāṉ
Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
